title: Profile
description: Frontend Engineer specializing in modern enterprise Angular applications, with hands-on production experience delivering scalable, high-traffic frontend solutions for international brands across Fintech, Healthcare, and E-commerce domains.

Experienced in driving technical solutions from functional requirements to production deployment. I build scalable, business-focused UIs leveraging REST API integration, modern state management, and core frontend technologies (TypeScript, Angular, HTML, CSS). Comfortable operating within Agile teams, coordinating with Backend, UX, and product stakeholders, while maintaining rigorous Git workflows.

Driven by a pragmatic engineering mindset, my core philosophy is 'maximizing the job not done': leveraging modern Angular tooling (Angular 17–21) to solve actual business problems without generating technical debt.
